Now in beta

Shongroho is a personal museum for your coins and banknotes: an interactive world map, flippable virtual albums, live silver stats and cloud sync, all in one beautiful catalogue.

World map

See your collection light up the globe

Every coin and banknote you add colours in its country on an interactive world map. Filter by region, colour by count or silver value, and watch the world fill in as your collection grows.

Virtual albums

Flip through real album pages

A Dansco 7070 U.S. type set and a complete Bangladesh year set, bound like the real thing. Turn the two-page spreads, click an opening and slot your coin in. Plus a World Country Set: fill in the map one country at a time.

Numista lookup

Add a coin or a banknote in seconds

Type a Numista catalogue number and Shongroho fills in the rest: issuer, years, composition, silver weight and photos of both faces. Banknotes get their own tailored form, and manual entry covers the oddities.

Country panorama

Double-click a country, see everything from it

The country lifts off the map and unfolds into its own panel, a flag-filled silhouette, records like oldest and heaviest, and every coin and banknote you own from that place.

Start your collection today

It takes a minute to set up.
